languages.text: The user suffers a penalty to Weapon Skill equal to 10% of its maximum.

languages.text: The user's Weapon Skill is reduced by −10%.
languages.original_text: The user suffers a penalty to Weapon Skill equal to 10% of its maximum.

traits.locale_text:
The maximum hit chance of the attacks made with a weapon in this hand is reduced by −10%.
If they have {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled left arm{/g}), it is reduced by −30% instead.

The user's Weapon Skill is reduced by −10%.

The maximum {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit chance{/g} of the attacks made with a weapon in this hand is reduced by −10%.
If they have a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled left arm{/g}), it is reduced by −30% instead.

languages.text: Ближний бой обладателя аугмента уменьшен на 10%.
languages.original_text: The user's Weapon Skill is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
Максимальный {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}шанс попадания{/g} атак оружием в этой руке уменьшен на 10%.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена левая рука{/g}, он уменьшен на 30%.
